seo.title: Kathy Smith's Project You! Type 2 Program Overview: Start Here
seo.description: Access the first all-in-one solution to manage diabetes with Kathy Smith's Project You! Type 2. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Wellness expert Kathy has committed herself to educating the public on diet, exercise, and other lifestyle changes that can help manage Type 2 diabetes and pre-diabetes. As a trusted motivator and role model, her goal is to get everyone engaged in a healthy and active lifestyle.

data.descriptionShort: A simple, revolutionary eating and exercise program for people with diabetes.
data.descriptionLong: Developed with doctors and the American Diabetes Association, this is the first all-in-one solution to manage diabetes, reduce your risk for complications, and get you back in control of your life.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Sturdy Chair or Stability Ball, Yoga Mat*
modules.categories: Cardio, Pilates, Strength, Bodyweight Training, Bootcamp, Weight Loss, Core, Yoga, Dance

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com
